name: template-dashboard
title: Dashboard
description: ERP overview page — KPI tiles with inline sparklines + recent-activity table. Drop-in starter for any landing/overview screen.
postInstall: Swap the KPIS / ORDERS constants for your real data.
Next.js: move to src/app/dashboard/page.tsx (it already has the default export). Vite: route it via <Route element={<DashboardPage />} />.
